Describing an issue with the info button on the variant selector in MediaLightbox.

intents.text: The variant selector info popup doesn't immediately open when clicked.

intents.text: Make the variant selector info popup open on both hover and click.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: it should be hover and click

intents.text: Make the variant info popup disappear immediately when the user dehovers.
